keyFindings.text: Custom Quote Calculator Plugin (QCP) active with 5 custom scripts — indicating a fundamentally different complexity profile than standard CPQ configuration.
20 active price rules and 37 active product rules detected — indicating significant business logic encoded in CPQ rule configuration.
345 CPQ licenses provisioned with 1 active user — indicating very low adoption. License utilization should be evaluated.
13 flows reference CPQ objects — indicating non-standard automation patterns that may require review.
Active integrations detected beyond core CPQ (billing, e-signature, tax calculation) — adding migration complexity.
Multi-currency enabled (AUD, GBP, EUR, NZD, USD) — adding complexity to field mapping and price book structures.
109 Apex classes reference CPQ objects — indicating substantial custom code dependency beyond standard CPQ configuration.

complexityHotspots.name: Quote Pricing Engine
complexityHotspots.analysis: 20 active Price Rules + 37 active Product Rules + 22 Discount Schedules + 5 Custom Scripts (QCP) form a multi-layered calculation chain.

complexityHotspots.name: DocuSign Document Chain
complexityHotspots.analysis: Quote PDF generation to DocuSign envelope to signing to Order creation spans CPQ, document generation, and e-signature.

complexityHotspots.name: Custom Code Dependencies
complexityHotspots.analysis: 109 Apex classes + 8 triggers reference CPQ objects. Code review required for full assessment.

complexityHotspots.name: Bundle & Option Configuration
complexityHotspots.analysis: 19 bundle-capable products (18 with active nested options) and 475 product options, enforced by Selection, Validation, Filter, and Alert product rules.

complexityHotspots.name: Custom Action Buttons
complexityHotspots.analysis: 63 custom action buttons configured across Quote, Line, Group, Configurator, and other panels — indicating UX-layer customization beyond core configuration.

scoringMethodology.drivers: Product catalog size, bundle nesting, option constraints, config attributes
scoringMethodology.rationale: Score reflects 179 total products (176 active), 19 bundle-capable products, and 475 product options. Moderate configuration surface area.

scoringMethodology.drivers: Price rules, discount schedules, custom scripts (QCP), contracted pricing
scoringMethodology.rationale: Score reflects 28 price rules, 22 discount schedules, and 5 custom script(s) (QCP). QCP presence significantly elevates pricing complexity.

scoringMethodology.drivers: Apex class count, trigger count, flow complexity, code dependencies, custom fields, validation rules
scoringMethodology.rationale: Score reflects 109 Apex classes, 8 triggers, and 13 flows referencing CPQ objects. Substantial custom code dependency detected.

scoringMethodology.rationale: Score reflects 23 quotes in the 90-day assessment window. Low volume — some metrics may not be statistically meaningful.
